title: EBA Reporting Framework 4.0
summary: European Banking Authority's comprehensive reporting framework defining data point models, validation rules, and submission requirements for supervisory reporting including COREP, FINREP, and other regulatory templates.

key_requirements.title: Data Point Model 4.0
key_requirements.description: Standardized data dictionary and taxonomy for all regulatory reporting

key_requirements.title: XBRL taxonomy compliance
key_requirements.description: Reports must be submitted in XBRL format following EBA taxonomy

key_requirements.title: Validation rules
key_requirements.description: All reports must pass EBA-defined validation rules before submission

key_requirements.title: Reporting frequency
key_requirements.description: Quarterly, semi-annual, and annual reporting cycles depending on template

engineering_implications.description: Implement XBRL generation engine with EBA taxonomy support
Map internal data model to EBA Data Point Model
Implement all EBA validation rules as pre-submission checks
Track all report generation, validation, and submission events
